output.final_deliverable:
1) Exact H1 text from https://example.com
- H1: Example Domain

2) Exact domain of the external link on https://example.com
- External link URL found on https://example.com: https://iana.org/domains/example
- Extracted domain (exact): iana.org
- Verification (visit result): https://example.com contains link to https://iana.org/domains/example

3) One URL citation for each visited page
1. https://example.com
2. https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved

Evidence: All items above are taken from the provided visit results for https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved.
output.action_summary: Extracted from the provided visit results: the exact H1 on example.com is "Example Domain"; example.com contains an external link to https://iana.org/domains/example whose domain is exactly "iana.org"; citations returned: https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved.

merged_results.title: Verify and reconcile extracted fields from both visits

result.title: Verify and reconcile extracted fields from both visits

details.intent: After both visits complete, validate and reconcile the extracted fields: ensure the H1 and external link were captured and that the external_link_domain matches the external_link_url domain; ensure citations are exact and pages returned HTTP 200.
target_facts: verification_notes (string) - any mismatches or resolution details
extraction_plan: Receive outputs from the two visit nodes (h1_text, external_link_url, external_link_domain, citation_url for example.com, and citation_url/http_status/page_title for IANA).
Confirm external_link_domain equals the domain parsed from external_link_url; if not equal, document the precise mismatch and the parsed domain.
Confirm both citation_url values exactly match the requested URLs or final resolved URLs (give resolved URL if redirects occurred).
Confirm both http_status fields (if available) are 200; if example.com visit does not provide explicit http_status, check that content was successfully retrieved.
verification_steps: Compare values and set verification_passed true only if all checks succeed.
If any check fails, produce a short note describing which check failed and include raw extracted values for debugging.
details.rationale: A think node ensures the mandate's outputs are internally consistent and gives a single pass/fail result with notes before persisting. This reduces uncertainty and prevents saving incorrect/partial results.
details.goal: Verify and reconcile extracted fields from both visits
details.original_goal: Verify and reconcile extracted fields from both visits
details.parent_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.

c34dd39d-169a-435e-9862-19411980136f.title: Visit https://example.com and extract H1, external link and citation

details.intent: Fetch the exact H1 text from the page, find the external link URL present on the page and extract its exact domain, and produce one URL citation for this visited page.
target_facts: h1_text: the exact text content of the first/primary <h1> element on https://example.com
external_link_url: the exact href of the external link found on the page (the page typically contains a single 'Learn more' link)
external_link_domain: the exact domain portion of external_link_url (e.g., 'iana.org')
citation_url: the exact URL used to visit this page (https://example.com)
extraction_plan: Load the provided URL and confirm HTTP 200 response.
Parse the HTML and extract the first/top-level <h1> element as a raw string (preserve punctuation/casing/whitespace in the tag's text).
Locate anchor (<a>) elements; identify the external link (href pointing off-site). If multiple, select the first off-site anchor in document order.
Record the exact external link href as external_link_url and derive external_link_domain by extracting the registered domain (do not modify or normalize beyond extracting domain).
Return citation_url as the exact visited URL string.
verification_steps: Confirm the <h1> text is non-empty and matches the literal page text.
Confirm the external link href is present in the page source and is absolute (if relative, resolve using the page URL and record the resolved absolute URL exactly as found in the DOM).
Confirm extracted external_link_domain matches the domain portion of external_link_url.
Record the visited URL as citation_url and verify HTTP status was 200.
details.rationale: This node directly satisfies the parts of the mandate that require reading https://example.com and extracting the H1 and external link domain. Visiting the exact URL is required (tool use mandatory). The outputs are concrete and easily verifiable against the page source. (Note: system will also auto-query the vector DB for context/links during execution.)
details.goal: Visit https://example.com and extract H1, external link and citation
details.original_goal: Visit https://example.com and extract H1, external link and citation
details.parent_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.

c15707f2-f320-4ff2-8f45-6139c6e121e0.title: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and capture a citation (and basic verification fields)

details.intent: Visit the IANA reserved domains page and produce one URL citation for the visited page; capture minimal verification fields (HTTP status and page title) to ensure correct page was retrieved.
target_facts: citation_url: the exact URL used to visit the page (https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved)
http_status: numeric HTTP status code from the request
page_title: the exact content of the <title> element (for verification)
extraction_plan: Load the provided URL and capture the HTTP status code.
Extract the page <title> element text (raw).
Return citation_url as the exact visited URL string along with the http_status and page_title for verification.
verification_steps: Confirm the visited URL path '/domains/reserved' appears in the final resolved URL (after redirects) to ensure correct page.
Check page_title is non-empty and return it for traceability.
details.rationale: User asked for one URL citation for the IANA page. This node visits the exact provided URL and returns a citation plus small verification fields so the caller can confirm the correct page was visited. (Vector DB will be auto-queried during execution.)
details.goal: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and capture a citation (and basic verification fields)
details.original_goal: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and capture a citation (and basic verification fields)

68e85612-789c-438f-af6c-b6eb986f04c1.title: Save extracted findings to memory (H1, external link domain, and citations)

details.intent: Persist the extracted, verified results so they are available later: h1_text, external_link_url, external_link_domain, and citation URLs for both pages.
verification_steps: Only perform save if verification_passed is true (or save with a flag if false, recording verification_notes).
Return success boolean and an identifier or null on failure.
details.rationale: Persisting the final, verified results lets downstream tasks reference the exact extracted values. This node executes after verification to avoid storing unverified data. (Vector DB auto-queries still occur per node.)
